jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Westside
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Westside! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Westside:
Westside is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Westside!
